# StealyourStats

> Grateful Dead setlist statistics, song performance history, and in-browser Archive.org audio playback.

StealyourStats indexes every known Grateful Dead setlist (via setlist.fm) and matches it against
community-contributed live recordings on Archive.org, so each show and song has a stats page and,
where a recording exists, playable audio.

## Key sections

- [Home](/): featured "on this day" show plus all-time song stats.
- [Songs](/songs): full canonical song catalog, each with first/last performance, set-position
  stats (opener/closer/encore), and all known recorded versions.
- [Shows](/shows): every documented show by year, with full setlists.
- [Venues](/venues): venues played, show counts, date ranges.
- [Artists / Members](/artists): band member bios and eras.
- [Eras](/eras): named stylistic eras of the band's touring history (1965-1995).

## Data sources

- Setlists: setlist.fm
- Audio: Archive.org community tape archive
